about.title: About EcoBrew Briquette
about.subtitle: Sustainable energy innovation from biomass waste for a greener future

profile.title: Company Profile
profile.description: EcoBrew Briquette is a bioenergy company focused on producing high-quality briquettes from coffee grounds and other biomass. Founded with a vision to lead the renewable energy transition, we combine innovative technology with a strong commitment to environmental sustainability. We serve various sectors from HORECA to heavy industry, as well as export markets in Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.

visiMisi.title: Vision & Mission

visi.title: Vision
visi.content: To become a leading global bioenergy company that transforms biomass waste into sustainable energy solutions for a greener future.

misi: Produce premium biomass briquettes with international standards.
Reduce environmental impact through responsible waste management.
Empower local communities through inclusive and sustainable supply chains.
Actively contribute to the achievement of Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
Educate the market about the benefits of biomass renewable energy.

cerita.title: The EcoBrew Story
cerita.content: EcoBrew was born from concern over the mounting coffee ground waste across Indonesia. As the world's fourth-largest coffee producer, Indonesia generates millions of tons of coffee grounds annually that end up in landfills. Through research and innovation, the EcoBrew team discovered a way to turn this 'waste' into 'black gold' - high-value biomass briquettes. Our journey began in a small laboratory, and has now grown into a company serving customers across multiple countries.

products.title: Products

items.title: EcoBrew Premium Briquette
items.description: Premium briquette with highest calorific value and cleanest burning. Suitable for various applications requiring reliable and consistent energy sources.

items.title: HORECA Briquette
items.description: Specifically designed for hotels, restaurants, and cafes. Provides stable heat for cooking and warming efficiently.

items.title: Industrial Briquette
items.description: Industrial grade briquette with high heat capacity to support large-scale manufacturing and production processes.

items.title: BBQ Briquette
items.tagline: Premium BBQ briquettes for special moments
items.description: Special BBQ briquettes that produce perfect heat for cooking. With natural aroma and clean burning, your BBQ will be more special.

bahanBaku.title: Raw Materials
bahanBaku.description: We use premium coffee grounds from leading roasteries, mixed with other natural biomass such as wood dust and coconut shells. Each raw material undergoes a strict selection process to ensure the best quality.

ekstraksi.title: Pectin Extraction
ekstraksi.description: The pectin extraction process from coffee grounds increases calorific value and reduces moisture content. This technology separates pectin components to produce briquettes with optimal burning performance.

steps.title: Material Collection
steps.description: Coffee grounds are collected from partner roasteries and cafes.

steps.title: Drying
steps.description: Raw materials are dried to optimal moisture content.

steps.title: Carbonization
steps.description: Controlled burning process to produce biomass charcoal.

steps.title: Pressing
steps.description: Charcoal is pressed under high pressure into dense briquettes.

steps.title: Final Drying
steps.description: Briquettes are dried again to ensure maximum quality.

steps.title: Quality Check
steps.description: Each batch is tested for calories, moisture, and strength.

steps.title: Packaging
steps.description: Products are packed ready for shipping with export standards.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.description: Every EcoBrew product undergoes a series of rigorous tests in our laboratory to ensure consistent quality.

laboratorium.title: Laboratory
laboratorium.description: Our modern laboratory facility is equipped with advanced instruments for research and product development, as well as accurate and reliable quality testing.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: EcoBrew's commitment to a greener future

circularEconomy.title: Circular Economy
circularEconomy.description: EcoBrew applies circular economy principles by transforming coffee ground waste into high-value energy products. Our business model reduces waste, creates value, and preserves natural resources.
items: Processing coffee ground waste into premium briquettes

emisi.title: Emission Reduction
emisi.description: EcoBrew briquettes produce up to 60% lower CO2 emissions compared to fossil fuels like coal and oil. Each ton of briquettes used replaces fossil fuels, directly contributing to carbon footprint reduction.
emisi.stat: Every 1 ton of EcoBrew briquettes reduces CO2 emissions by up to 1.8 tons

limbah.title: Waste Utilization
limbah.description: Indonesia produces over 300,000 tons of coffee grounds annually. EcoBrew utilizes this waste into a valuable energy source, turning an environmental problem into a sustainable solution.
